title: A Weekend Plan
summary: Two friends discuss what to do on Saturday — modals, going to, suggestions.
script:
Anna: Hey Mark, what are you doing this weekend?
Mark: Not much. I think I'm going to stay home. Why?
Anna: There's a new exhibition at the science museum. Do you want to come with me?
Mark: That sounds interesting. When are you planning to go?
Anna: How about Saturday afternoon? Around three?
Mark: I can't on Saturday. I have my sister's birthday in the morning, and I'll probably be tired afterwards. Could we go on Sunday instead?
Anna: Sunday works for me. Let's meet at the entrance at two.
Mark: Perfect. Should I bring anything?
Anna: Just your curiosity. The tickets are free for residents.
Mark: Great. See you on Sunday then.
Anna: See you!

questions.q: Where does Anna want to go?
Why can't Mark go on Saturday?
What day do they finally choose?
At what time will they meet?
How much do the tickets cost for residents?
